stories.headline: Amazon Invests Additional $5 Billion in Anthropic With Up to $25 Billion More to Follow
stories.key_takeaway: Amazon's potential $33B+ total investment in Anthropic, paired with a $100B cloud spending pledge and 5 GW of compute capacity, marks the largest AI infrastructure partnership to date.

pull_quote.text: Our custom AI silicon offers high performance at significantly lower cost for customers, which is why it's in such hot demand.

stories.article_excerpt: Amazon is doubling down on its biggest AI bet yet, committing $5 billion immediately to Anthropic and opening the door to an additional $20 bi

stories.headline: SoundHound AI Acquires LivePerson for $250 Million, Creating Conversational AI Powerhouse
stories.key_takeaway: SoundHound AI's $250M all-stock acquisition of LivePerson combines voice AI with digital messaging to create an omnichannel conversational AI platform serving 25 Fortune 100 companies.

pull_quote.text: Artificial boundaries between talking and typing are disappearing, and this merger delivers seamless omnichannel experiences.

stories.article_excerpt: SoundHound AI is betting a quarter of a billion dollars that the future of customer service lies in erasing the line between talking

stories.headline: Jeff Bezos Nears $10 Billion Funding Round for AI Lab at $38 Billion Valuation
stories.key_takeaway: Jeff Bezos's Project Prometheus is close to raising $10 billion at a $38 billion valuation from JPMorgan and BlackRock, making it one of the most valuable early-stage AI startups ever.

pull_quote.text: We are building intelligence that doesn't just predict the next word -- it predicts the next state of a physical system.

stories.article_excerpt: Barely five months after launching with $6.2 billion, Project Prometheus is poised to become one of the most richly valued AI startups on the pla

stories.headline: AcuityMD Raises $80 Million Series C to Scale AI-Powered MedTech Sales Platform
stories.key_takeaway: AcuityMD's $80M Series C at a $955M valuation signals strong investor confidence in vertical AI platforms that embed domain-specific intelligence into regulated industry workflows.

pull_quote.text: AI will transform MedTech, but only with the right context, deeply embedded in the workflows where decisions are made.

stories.article_excerpt: Medical device companies have long struggled with a fragmented data landscape. AcuityMD just raised $80 million to make that proble

stories.headline: Morgan Stanley Says Agentic AI Will Add $32.5 to $60 Billion to Data-Center CPU Market by 2030
stories.key_takeaway: Morgan Stanley projects agentic AI will add $32.5-60 billion to the data-center CPU market by 2030, shifting the AI investment thesis from GPUs to full-stack infrastructure.

pull_quote.text: As AI transitions from generation to autonomous action, the computing bottleneck is shifting towards CPU and memory.

stories.article_excerpt: The artificial intelligence boom has been a GPU story. Morgan Stanley thinks the next chapter will be written in CPUs and memory chips.

stories.headline: Moonshot AI Releases Kimi K2.6 With 1 Trillion Parameters and 300-Agent Swarm Capability
stories.key_takeaway: Moonshot AI's open-weight Kimi K2.6 tops GPT-5.4 and Claude Opus 4.6 on SWE-Bench Pro while introducing 300-agent swarm orchestration.

pull_quote.text: By orchestrating 100 or even 1,000 sub-agents in parallel, we can accomplish complex tasks within a timeframe that is tolerable for the real world.

stories.article_excerpt: Beijing-based Moonshot AI has released Kimi K2.6, a one-trillion-parameter open-weight model that can coordinate 300 autonomous sub-agents

stories.headline: OpenAI Launches Chronicle in Codex, Giving AI Coding Assistant Screen-Based Memory
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI's Chronicle feature gives Codex screen-based memory by capturing and processing screenshots into local text summaries, but ships with significant privacy gaps.

pull_quote.text: The internal working name for this was 'telepathy,' and it feels like it.

stories.article_excerpt: OpenAI wants its AI coding assistant to remember what you have been working on — by watching your screen. The company on April 20 released Chronicle,

stories.headline: Alibaba Ships Fun-ASR 1.5, a 30-Billion-Parameter Speech Model Covering 30 Languages
stories.key_takeaway: Alibaba's Tongyi Lab released Fun-ASR 1.5, a 30B-parameter MoE speech model that unifies 30 languages and seven Chinese dialect groups, cutting dialect error rates by 56.2%.

pull_quote.text: We look forward to collaborating with DingTalk to drive innovative applications of speech recognition technology in enterprise settings.
pull_quote.role: Head of Speech Team, Tongyi Lab

stories.headline: OpenAI Turns On Cost-Per-Click Ads in ChatGPT, Setting Bids at $3 to $5
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI's shift from CPM-only to CPC bidding at $3-$5 per click opens ChatGPT advertising to performance marketers.

pull_quote.text: This is going to help advertisers directly compare their results on OpenAI to other major advertising platforms.

stories.article_excerpt: OpenAI has quietly flipped a switch that could reshape the economics of AI-powered advertising. Just ten weeks after launching its first

stories.headline: NEURA Robotics and AWS Partner to Accelerate Physical AI Deployment at Scale
stories.key_takeaway: NEURA Robotics and AWS are building an end-to-end pipeline from cloud-based simulation to real-world deployment, aiming to close the critical training data gap in Physical AI.

pull_quote.text: Physical AI will only reach its full potential if intelligence can be trained, validated, and continuously improved in the real world.

stories.article_excerpt: German cognitive robotics startup NEURA Robotics has entered a strategic collaboration with Amazon Web Services to train, validate, and deploy

stories.headline: ICLR 2026 Opens in Rio de Janeiro With 3,462 Papers and 10 Outstanding Awards
stories.key_takeaway: ICLR 2026 accepted 3,462 papers at a three-year-low acceptance rate while grappling with findings that 21% of peer reviews were AI-generated.

pull_quote.text: 21% of 75,800 public ICLR review comments were highly suspected of being entirely AI-generated.

stories.article_excerpt: The machine learning world descends on Rio de Janeiro this week for ICLR 2026, where 3,462 papers will be presented amid concerns about AI-gen

stories.headline: PwC Study Finds 20 Percent of Companies Capture Three-Quarters of AI Economic Gains
stories.key_takeaway: Just 20% of companies capture 74% of AI economic value by prioritizing growth and business reinvention over incremental efficiency.

pull_quote.text: Many companies are busy rolling out AI pilots, but only a minority are converting that activity into measurable financial returns.

stories.article_excerpt: A sweeping new study from PwC has laid bare a stark and widening divide in the corporate AI race: just 20 percent of organizations are capturing ne

stories.headline: MIT Technology Review Unveils 10 Things That Matter in AI Right Now for 2026
stories.key_takeaway: MIT Technology Review launched a dedicated annual AI list covering 10 forces reshaping the field, from China's open-weight strategy to a growing global backlash.

pull_quote.text: Keep the secret sauce behind an API, and charge for every drop. China's leading AI labs are playing a different game.

AI bills passed by US states in 2025

stories.headline: Skild AI Acquires Zebra Technologies Robotics Unit to Build AI Warehouse Fleet Brain
stories.key_takeaway: Skild AI's acquisition of Zebra's robotics unit creates the first end-to-end omnibodied AI warehouse automation stack, backed by $1.9B in funding and a $14B+ valuation.

pull_quote.text: Warehouse automation today is extremely fragmented. Through this deal, Skild has an opportunity to redefine how humans and robots can work together.

stories.article_excerpt: A Pittsburgh-based startup that barely existed three years ago just made the boldest move yet in the race to automate the world's warehou

stories.headline: Anthropic Rolls Out Government ID Verification for Some Claude Users
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic is the first major AI chatbot provider to require government ID and biometric selfie verification for flagged users, sparking significant privacy backlash.

pull_quote.text: This applies to a small number of cases where we see activity that indicates potentially fraudulent or abusive behavior.

stories.article_excerpt: If you have been using Claude and suddenly get asked to hold up your passport to a webcam, you are not alone. Anthropic quietly updated its su

stories.headline: Hannover Messe 2026 Opens With Humanoid Robots and Industrial AI Center Stage
stories.key_takeaway: Hannover Messe 2026 marks the moment humanoid robots and industrial AI moved from research curiosity to factory-floor reality, with 15 companies showcasing humanoid systems.

pull_quote.text: Competitiveness is built where innovations are rapidly put into practice.
